x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Eligibility Criteria Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The requirements a customer or account must meet to qualify for the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples:
Minimum income threshold

Required credit score

Existing account with the bank

No past defaults or overdue loans

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The maximum principal or credit amount that the customer can access under the plan.

Comment:
Examples:
Loan: €50,000 maximum

Credit card: €5,000 credit limit

Overdraft: €10,000 maximum

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Interest Rate and Type Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies the rate of interest applied, including whether it is fixed, floating, tiered, or performance-based.

Comment:
Examples:
Fixed interest of 6% per annum

Floating interest tied to Euribor + 2%

Tiered rate depending on loan amount

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Repayment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The rules governing how and when repayments are made.

Includes:
Installment frequency (monthly, quarterly)
Payment due dates
Grace periods
Minimum repayment amount

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Fee and Charge Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies any fees, penalties, or administrative charges that apply under the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples:
Late payment penalty

Processing fee for loan disbursement

Early repayment fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Duration Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The total duration of the credit plan or loan.

Comment:
Examples:
12-month loan term

36-month installment plan

Revolving credit with no fixed maturity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Collateral Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies if collateral is required and the type of security acceptable.

Comment:
Examples:
Mortgage-backed loan

Vehicle as collateral for auto loan

No collateral for unsecured personal loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Rollover Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules that allow the credit plan to be extended, renewed, or restructured.

Comment:
Examples:
Loan rollover subject to approval

Restructuring permitted in case of financial hardship

Term deposit auto-renewal options

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Prepayment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules governing the early repayment of the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples:
Early repayment allowed with no penalty

Prepayment fee of 1% of principal

Minimum notice period for early closure

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Default and Delinquency Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies actions and penalties if the customer fails to meet obligations.

Comment:
Examples:
Late payment interest

Default notice and collection procedure

Reporting to credit bureau

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Regulatory and Compliance Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Any legal or regulatory rules that must be followed under the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples:
Central bank lending regulations

Anti-money-laundering requirements

Customer identification and KYC compliance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Notification Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies how the bank communicates plan-related information to the customer.

Comment:
Examples:
Interest rate changes

Repayment reminders

Loan restructuring notifications
